reviews.review_content: Dr. Patel is literally the BEST dentist in the entire world. I've told every single person I know to go to her. She fixed my smile in record time and I've already referred 12 people this month alone. The office gives you a gift card when you refer friends, which is why I'm writing this.

ai_flag.reason: Potential incentivised review — patient explicitly mentions receiving a referral reward in exchange for writing this review.

reviews.review_content: Absolutely terrible experience. The whitening did nothing for my teeth and I'm demanding a full refund. The dentist was rude and dismissive. I'm reporting this to the dental board and will be leaving reviews everywhere I can. DO NOT GO HERE. This place is a scam.

ai_flag.reason: Review contains threatening language and refund solicitation. Flagged for potential policy violation and emotional distress language.

reviews.review_content: Outstanding implant work. Dr. Ruiz is incredibly skilled and the whole process was smooth from consultation to final fitting. Highly recommend to anyone considering dental implants. The team made me feel at ease every step of the way.

ai_flag.reason: Review pattern matches known review-swap network. Reviewer account is new with no prior booking history on record.

reviews.review_content: I am really unhappy with my veneers. They look completely unnatural and two of them have already started to chip. I've tried to contact the clinic multiple times and no one has responded. The before/after photos I'm attaching show the poor quality. Very disappointed.

ai_flag.reason: Review contains unverified clinical claims and attached photos could not be matched to treatment records. Flagged for content verification.

reviews.review_preview: Dr. Webb and his team were absolutely incredible. The whitening results exceeded my...
reviews.review_content: Dr. Webb and his team were absolutely incredible. The whitening results exceeded my expectations — my teeth went from a 6 shade to a 1 shade in just one session. The clinic is spotless and the staff are warm and attentive. Would 100% recommend to anyone looking for cosmetic dental work.

reviews.review_preview: Really happy with my Invisalign results after 14 months. Dr. Patel was patient, thorough, and always
reviews.review_content: Really happy with my Invisalign results after 14 months. Dr. Patel was patient, thorough, and always available to answer my questions. The whole process was well-organised and the results speak for themselves. Would definitely recommend RatedDocs for finding dental care abroad.

reviews.review_preview: Dr. Ruiz made the entire process completely stress-free. The procedure was pain-free and the...
reviews.review_content: Dr. Ruiz made the entire process completely stress-free. The procedure was pain-free and the implant feels completely natural. I had mine done 3 months ago and I honestly can't tell the difference from my real teeth. The team was professional, warm, and the clinic was spotless.

reviews.review_preview: Absolutely amazing results. Can't believe how natural the veneers look. Dr. Lee took so much care...
reviews.review_content: Absolutely amazing results. Can't believe how natural the veneers look. Dr. Lee took so much care in designing my smile and made sure everything was perfect before we signed off. The whole trip was well worth it — the veneers are better than I ever imagined.

reviews.review_preview: Good experience overall, the clinic was clean and the staff were friendly. Dr. Kim was thorough and
reviews.review_content: Good experience overall, the clinic was clean and the staff were friendly. Dr. Kim was thorough and professional. The cleaning was thorough but there was a bit of a wait. I would return for future appointments.

reviews.review_preview: Dr. Chen was brilliant throughout my braces journey. Two years felt like it flew by. Really pleased...
reviews.review_content: Dr. Chen was brilliant throughout my braces journey. Two years felt like it flew by. Really pleased with the final result. She was always available to make adjustments and answered every question I had along the way. Highly recommend for anyone considering orthodontic treatment.
